content: Inspect screenshots to identify which components are leaking English
Build a regex-based audit script that flags JSX text literals, placeholders, aria-labels, alt text, toast strings, and other user-facing English in /app/frontend/src
Cross-reference findings against existing keys in en.json to avoid duplicates
Generate /app/docs/locale_backfill_untranslated.json with proposed new i18n keys + English source values + file:line reference
Spot-check 8-10 findings by opening the actual files to verify they're real leaks (not false positives)
